title: Bows to Guns - R6S
description: Changes crossbows and bows to be Rainbow Six Siege-styled guns.
body:
![Bows to Guns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mpygNC8H/images/3e45e0cc6b3dec9c48805429afaaffe51a124828.png)

# 📃 Overview
**Bows to Guns - R6S** replaces the bow and crossbow with models based on Rainbow Six Siege weapons. Currently, it features the **R4-C** and **BOSG.12.2**.

This is an **unofficial fan-made pack** with **no affiliation to Ubisoft.**

# 📂 Items
These are the current items in the latest version.

### R4-C
- Replaces **Bow**
- Animation: Aiming down sights
- **Black Ice** Weapon Skin
- Holo A Sight

### BOSG.12.2
- Replaces **Crossbow**
- Animation: Break-action/reloading and aiming down sights
- Default Weapon Skin
- ACOG Sight

### Bullet
- Replaces **Arrow**
- Uses a universal gray, "neutral" bullet since multiple guns wouldn’t realistically share ammo

# 📦 Other Packs
You can find my other projects on my [profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheMaster223).
